# Alpha section

The alpha section opens with a short paragraph about widget assembly.
It runs a couple of lines so the chunker has something real to merge.

A second paragraph follows after a blank line, still comfortably small,
talking about how the widgets are boxed and labelled for shipping.

## Beta section

Beta covers calibration. Another compact paragraph that should merge
with its neighbours up toward the target size rather than stand alone.

# Gamma section

Gamma closes the file with one final paragraph about quality control
and the checklist the inspectors run before anything leaves the floor.
